title: Moonlit Meadow Echo
theme: Unknown sounds feel smaller when someone helps you understand them.
parentSummary: A gentle echo story about naming a strange sound, staying close to friends, and letting fear shrink into laughter.

readAloudText.Drift: The friends step into a sleepy meadow together.
readAloudText.Wonder: Daisy, Dino, Pip, and Itsy step into the meadow as the last sun stripe rests on the grass.
readAloudText.Explore: At the edge of the meadow, Daisy counted three fireflies, Dino carried the picnic blanket, Pip listened carefully, and Itsy waved from a fern.
